titles.en: Punishment of not performing Ghusl-e- Janaabat
Punishment of not performing Ghusl-e- Janaabat

segments: حَدَّثَنَا سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ أَبِی الْخَطَّابِ عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ أَبِی بَشِیرٍ عَنْ حُجْرِ بْنِ زَائِدَهَ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الصَّادِقِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ تَرَکَ شَعْرَهً مِنَ الْجَنَابَهِ مُتَعَمِّداً فَهُوَ فِی النَّارِ.
arabic.text: حَدَّثَنَا سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ أَبِی الْخَطَّابِ عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ أَبِی بَشِیرٍ عَنْ حُجْرِ بْنِ زَائِدَهَ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الصَّادِقِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ تَرَکَ شَعْرَهً مِنَ الْجَنَابَهِ مُتَعَمِّداً فَهُوَ فِی النَّارِ.

segments: 1. It was narrated to me by my father (rah) said: it was narrated to us by Sa’d b. Abdillah who said it was narrated to us by Muhammad b. al-Hussain b. Abi al-Khattab from Ja’far b. Abi Basheer from Hajar b. Zayida from Abi Abdillah al-Sadiq (a.s.) who said: “One who leaves a part of his body equal to the size of a hair intentionally while performing Ghusl-e-Janaabat will go to Hell.”
en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs.text: 1. It was narrated to me by my father (rah) said: it was narrated to us by Sa’d b. Abdillah who said it was narrated to us by Muhammad b. al-Hussain b. Abi al-Khattab from Ja’far b. Abi Basheer from Hajar b. Zayida from Abi Abdillah al-Sadiq (a.s.) who said: “One who leaves a part of his body equal to the size of a hair intentionally while performing Ghusl-e-Janaabat will go to Hell.”
